LanguageData.VQED_AncientHullTile.description: Rusted tiles of an ancient silo.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHullTile.label: ancient silo tile
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMetalGrate.description: Ancient, rusted metal grates with some machinery visible underneath.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMetalGrate.label: ancient metal grate
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSterileTile.description: Ancient sterile tiles with special cleanliness-enhancing properties. Now heavily rusted, with old blood stains still present.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSterileTile.label: ancient sterile tile
LanguageData.VQED_EerieFloor.description: Mysterious floor of an unknown origin, with eerily smooth surface and etchings.
LanguageData.VQED_EerieFloor.label: eerie floor
